status_meaning.draft: Listed in catalog, not for sale. Prices and Gumroad links must be set by the owner.

entity_firewall: All entries are entity='luminara'. KORËNA, Kai Jurek, AWAKING, Point4Brand, SWARM ORACLE products are NOT in this catalog. Add a new entity section when those products ship.

products.name: LUMINARA — Main
products.description: LUMINARA master landing — sovereign-futurism, neon minimalism, brand hub.
products.notes: Currently served as a free public page. No purchase required.
publish_checklist: Decide if the page should be sold at all — it is currently free on luminara-pages.vercel.app
If yes: pick a price tier (typical Gumroad digital: $9 / $19 / $47)
On gumroad.com → New Product → Digital Product
Title: LUMINARA — Main
Description: copy the `description` field from this catalog entry
Cover image: upload /public/products/luminara-main/hero.svg (or a PNG export of it)
File: bundle the .html source as a zip alongside any linked assets
Set a custom URL slug on Gumroad matching the luminara-main
Add a 'Requires a browser' requirement line in the description
Publish

products.name: LUMINARA — Video Pipeline (Hermes skill bundle)
products.description: Hermes .skill bundle for LUMINARA video pipeline. 41 KB.
products.notes: Format unknown (not opened). .skill is a Hermes skill bundle, may not be a 'product' — listing as draft for visibility.
publish_checklist: NOTE: a Hermes .skill bundle is NOT a typical Gumroad product. Decide whether to:
(a) sell the .skill as a digital download (treat it as a binary file),
(b) sell the skill's README + installation instructions as documentation, or
(c) skip Gumroad and distribute via Hermes skill registry instead.
If (a): zip the .skill + any companion docs, upload as a Digital Product
If (b): write a 1-3 page install guide PDF, upload as Documentation
If (c): abandon this entry in the catalog
Title: LUMINARA — Video Pipeline (Hermes skill bundle)
Description: copy the `description` field from this catalog entry
Cover image: upload /public/products/skill-luminara-video-pipeline/hero.svg
Publish

publish_runbook.scope: Manual publish flow on gumroad.com. No API calls, no automation, no shared credentials.
before_publishing_any_entry: Decide entity separation: are these LUMINARA, KORËNA, or another entity? Never mix on one Gumroad profile.
Decide whether to publish at all — LUMINARA is a free public site, not all entries should be sold.
Set prices per product (current catalog: price_usd=null for all).
Decide license: CC0 / CC-BY / commercial / proprietary — one decision per product.
Reconcile known gaps flagged in catalog notes (e.g. arcana dir has 12 SVGs on disk, codex claims 22).
publish_runbook.caution: Do not paste a Vercel API token or Gumroad API token into this repository or any chat. Tokens must be entered into gumroad.com and vercel.com directly, by the account owner.
